summary: First-run e2e testing on Meesho Seller Dashboard (FastAPI + React against real EC2 MongoDB). 23/23 pytest backend tests pass (100%). Frontend e2e via Playwright: login (valid/invalid), protected routes, sidebar nav, submit job (valid + skipped invalid), jobs filter/retry/delete, products list + detail (star filter, review sort), analytics KPIs/charts/top sellers/helpful reviews, logout. All critical flows pass.

minor.issue: Route returns 404. `@api.get('/health')` is declared AFTER `app.include_router(api)` in server.py (line 473 vs 463), so it's never registered. Move it above the include_router call.

issues: Recharts warns 'width(-1) height(-1)' on first paint (ResponsiveContainer race). Charts render correctly afterwards — cosmetic only, no user-visible breakage.

action_items: Minor: move `@api.get('/health')` definition above `app.include_router(api)` in /app/backend/server.py so /api/health returns 200 (currently 404).
Optional: on the analytics page, set explicit min-height on Recharts ResponsiveContainer wrappers to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial paint.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: /api/health is unreachable because the route is registered on the APIRouter AFTER `app.include_router(api)` (server.py lines 463 then 473). FastAPI snapshots routes at include time.
Security/operational: JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env. Fine for preview, but should be rotated before production.
serialize_doc strips Mongo `_id` and maps to `id` correctly — good. datetime is ISO-serialized — good.
Jobs endpoints return 200 on create (not 201). Acceptable but inconsistent with REST convention.
reset-stuck intentionally resets legacy processing jobs without started_at — called out as acceptable by the user; behavior correct.
Product list uses `.find(query, {"reviews": 0})` to exclude heavy reviews array — good performance decision.
No rate-limit / brute-force protection on /api/auth/login (auth_testing.md suggests lockout after 5 fails). Currently missing; acceptable for single-admin preview app.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 transient test jobs with product_url pattern https://www.meesho.com/test-product-{uuid}/p/TEST{uuid} during testing. Session-scoped fixture auto-deletes them via DELETE /api/jobs/{id}. Two preserved products (8sa1ay, aeop5q) untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are pytest-class based in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Tests clean up their own jobs but do NOT touch products 8sa1ay/aeop5q or pre-existing user jobs. Real remote MongoDB at mongodb://43.205.229.129:27017/meesho. The worker.py is NOT running in preview — any new submitted jobs stay 'pending' indefinitely (expected).
rca_of_the_issue: The only backend bug found: /api/health returns 404. RCA: route decorator `@api.get('/health')` sits below `app.include_router(api)`, so FastAPI's router copied before the route was added. Fix: move the health handler above line 463 (`app.include_router(api)`). No reproduction steps needed: `curl BASE/api/health` -> {"detail":"Not Found"}.
